overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a nighttime rooftop campfire gathering in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The stationary camera observes a group of people socializing around a central bonfire with distinctive illuminated twin towers visible in the background skyline, creating a contrast between the warm firelight and cool blue urban atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on a rooftop where a group of people gather around a central campfire. The warm firelight illuminates the social circle while futuristic twin towers glow in the distant city skyline. Wind turbines stand silhouetted on either side as individuals sit on chairs and crates, with one figure playing an instrument on the left and another gesturing expressively on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric observation of a futuristic rooftop gathering where warm firelight contrasts with a cool, neon-lit urban horizon. It begins with a wide view of a social circle huddled around a central campfire, the orange glow illuminating the faces of people seated on chairs and crates. As the eye wanders across the scene, the focus shifts to the figures on the periphery, including a musician playing an instrument on the left and a gesturing companion on the right. The perspective then expands to encompass the surrounding environment, where silhouetted wind turbines frame the gathering against a distant city skyline. Finally, the gaze settles on the glowing twin towers that pierce the night sky, anchoring the intimate warmth of the fire within the vast, cold expanse of the cyberpunk metropolis.
